on_start.default: We are starting to practice left knee raises.

on_warning.default: Try to lift your left leg better.

on_phase.lift_left_leg_start: We are starting to practice left knee raises excercise
on_phase.lift_left_leg_end: End of knee lifts on the left leg. Now we're going to take a fifteen-second break.
on_phase.left_leg_down: Lift your left knee and place your right hand on your hip.
on_phase.left_leg_up: Place your foot on the ground and your right hand on your shoulder.
